prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年天津市综合类最低位次分别为1429→1417→1356→1937→1735名。2024年因选科要求调整为"历史必选"组，位次大幅后移至1937名；2025年回升至1735名 ，显示报考热度有所恢复。近两年波动幅度较大（约200–580名），反映选科改革后考生报考行为仍在调整中；2021–2024年该校在津招生计划均为83人，2025年 缩减至75人（缩招约9.6%）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京航空航天大学为985工程、211工程、 双一流建设高校，位于北京市，属顶尖理工类院校，对高分考生有持续强吸引力；优势学科，未纳入判 断。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次回升趋势（1937→1735）、2025年缩招带来的竞争加剧 效应以及北航作为顶尖985的持续吸引力，预计2026年最低位次在2025年1735名基础上继续小幅前移。预测最低位次约1705名，区间1500–1910名。

- 工科试验班类（未来空天领军计划）
- 工科试验班类（未来工程师项目制育人试验班）
- 工科试验班类（量子科技先锋计划）
- 微电子科学与工程（卓越人才培养试验班）。

- 工程力学（拔尖学生培养计划）
- 工科试验班类（计算与智能科学类）

- 理科试验班类。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1500–1910名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（1500名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌工科试验班；位次接近 区间上限（1910名附近）应以三档专业为主，谨慎填报。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for comprehensive subjects in Tianjin were 1429 → 1417 → 1356 → 1937 → 1735 respectively. In 2024, due to the adjustment of subject selection requirements to "History Required" group, the ranking significantly shifted back to 1937; in 2025, it rebounded to 1735, indicating a recovery in application enthusiasm. The fluctuation range in the past two years has been relatively large (about 200–580 places), reflecting that candidates' application behavior is still adjusting after the subject selection reform; from 2021 to 2024, the university's enrollment plan in Tianjin was 83 students each year, and in 2025 it was reduced to 75 students (a reduction of about 9.6%).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beihang University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, located in Beijing. It is a top-tier science and engineering institution, with a sustained strong appeal to high-scoring candidates; advantageous disciplines are not included in the judgment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the upward trend in rankings from 2024 to 2025 (1937 → 1735), the intensified competition due to enrollment reduction in 2025, and Beihang's sustained appeal as a top 985 university, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to move slightly forward from the 2025 ranking of 1735. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1705, with a range of 1500–1910.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1500–1910, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1500), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship engineering experimental classes; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 1910), you should mainly choose Tier 3 majors and apply cautiously.
